camera.notes: Perspective camera/controller package foundation over the cooked desktop runtime scene.

inputMap.purpose: Drive deterministic camera/controller movement over the cooked primary camera node.

coreLoop.objective: Load the cooked 3D desktop runtime package, move the primary camera, and prove scene GPU/UI/shadow package evidence on supported hosts.
coreLoop.feedback: Scene GPU binding, UI overlay, directional shadow, postprocess, renderer-quality, and package smoke counters report host-gated feedback.
coreLoop.winState: Installed D3D12 or strict Vulkan scene GPU recipes report ready scene, camera, shader, UI, and renderer-quality evidence.
coreLoop.failState: Missing package files, missing shader artifacts, stale unsupported claims, or unsafe native handle access fail validation.
coreLoop.restart: Rerun installed package validation from the manifest-derived runtime files and selected host-gated shader artifacts.

sceneList.purpose: Desktop runtime configuration shipped through runtimePackageFiles.
Package index used by runtime scene loading and installed validation.

assetRequests.purpose: Cooked texture fixture for material and scene GPU package evidence.
Cooked mesh payload for scene draw and GPU skinning package evidence.
Runtime material fixture for scene rendering and package validation.
Cooked UI atlas metadata for native overlay package evidence.

qualityGates.evidence: Installed package validation loads manifest-derived config, package index, and cooked 3D scene payloads.
D3D12 and strict Vulkan scene GPU smokes report selected host-gated scene, camera, shader, and renderer counters.

aiOwnedSourceRoots.evidence: Generated game-owned files are confined to this root; shared repository surfaces require a separate developer-owned task.
Runtime package payload changes must stay manifest-listed and validation-recipe-backed.
Generated source authoring fixtures remain game-local before reviewed cook/package handoff.
Generated shader source fixtures remain game-local and require shader-toolchain validation before package claims.

forbiddenSharedPaths.reason: Engine internals require a separate developer-owned capability task.
Editor internals are outside generated-game mutation scope.
Shared automation changes require a repository workflow task.
Shared schema changes require explicit agent-surface synchronization.
Machine-readable engine contracts are composed from reviewed fragments only.
CI workflow changes are outside generated-game mutation scope.
Plan and production-ledger changes are developer-owned repository work.
Shared game registration is changed only by reviewed scaffolding tools.

remediationActions.trigger: A manifest-declared runtime package payload is missing or not registered.
remediationActions.expectedResult: Repair only game-local runtime payload registration before rerunning package validation.

remediationActions.trigger: A requested change targets a forbidden shared repository path.
remediationActions.expectedResult: Stop and record a developer-owned handoff instead of editing shared surfaces.

remediationActions.trigger: A requested game behavior needs an unsupported reusable engine capability.
remediationActions.expectedResult: Persist a reviewed aiWorkflow.engineCapabilityHandoffs row with first-party public-contract evidence.

remediationActions.trigger: A selected validation recipe fails after generated game-local mutation.
remediationActions.expectedResult: Repair game-owned rows without weakening validation, deleting evidence, or changing shared tooling.

reviewedToolSurfaces.evidence: Plans deterministic first-party placeholder source documents and provenance rows without external asset downloads.
Routes placeholder source documents through registered source cook/package planning before runtime package consumption.

packageHandoff.evidence: Package handoff stays manifest-listed, first-party, and validation-recipe-backed before runtime use.

gameplayContract.input: mirakana::VirtualInput deterministic right-key camera/controller movement over the cooked primary camera node
gameplayContract.scene: GameEngine.Scene.v1 loaded from a cooked package with static mesh, primary perspective camera, and directional light metadata
gameplayContract.sceneRenderer: mirakana::submit_scene_render_packet with material instance intent through first-party scene/material contracts
gameplayContract.ui: mirakana::ui::UiDocument HUD diagnostics through mirakana::submit_ui_renderer_submission with host-gated native GPU runtime UI overlay output for box sprites and cooked texture/atlas-backed image sprites whose UiRendererImagePalette bindings are built from first-party UI atlas package metadata; production text/font/image/atlas/accessibility remains unsupported; source image decoding and production atlas packing remain unsupported
gameplayContract.renderer: mirakana::IRenderer from the desktop host with deterministic NullRenderer fallback
gameplayContract.currentRuntime: host-gated 3D desktop package foundation with cooked skinned mesh scene (GameEngine.CookedSkinnedMesh.v1), material instance intent, camera/controller movement, HUD
